$comment: Copy this to ./mlx-models.json (gitignored) and edit paths + IDs for your machine. Each entry becomes a separate OpenAI-compatible provider in the user's opencode.json (provider id: mlx-<id>). `scripts/start-mlx.sh` spawns one `mlx_lm.server` process per entry; `scripts/stop-mlx.sh` stops them by PID file.
